heading: Publication of list of recognized tribes
label: 5131 Publication of list of recognized tribes
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 479a–1 of this title

children.heading: Publication of list
children.label: a Publication of list
children.text: The Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register a list of all Indian tribes which the Secretary recognizes to be eligible for the special programs and services provided by the United States to Indians because of their status as Indians.

children.heading: Frequency of publication
children.label: b Frequency of publication
children.text: The list shall be published within 60 days of , and annually on or before every January 30 thereafter.November 2, 1994
